arxiv:2402.11163.title: KG-Agent: An Efficient Autonomous Agent Framework for Complex Reasoning over Knowledge Graph
arxiv:2402.11163.abstract: In this paper, we aim to improve the reasoning ability of large language models~(LLMs) over knowledge graphs~(KGs) to answer complex questions. Inspired by existing methods that design the interaction strategy between LLMs and KG, we propose an autonomous LLM-based agent framework, called KG-Agent, which enables a small LLM to actively make decisions until finishing the reasoning process over KGs. In KG-Agent, we integrate the LLM, multifunctional toolbox, KG-based executor, and knowledge memory, and develop an iteration mechanism that autonomously selects the tool then updates the memory for reasoning over KG. To guarantee the effectiveness, we leverage program language to formulate the multi-hop reasoning process over the KG, and synthesize a code-based instruction dataset to fine-tune the base LLM. Extensive experiments demonstrate that only using 10K samples for tuning LLaMA-7B can outperform state-of-the-art methods using larger LLMs or more data, on both in-domain and out-domain datasets. Our code and data will be publicly released.
arxiv:2402.11163.synthesis_narrative: 近年的工作在三个技术方向上为 KG-Agent 提供了直接的构建模块和问题意识：一类是面向 KG 的协同交互方法（以 StructGPT 为代表），它们把 LLM 的语言理解能力与对 KG 的结构化查询结合起来，通过多轮交互或 SPARQL grounding 完成多跳问答；另一类是语言代理范式（如 ReAct、AutoGPT、ProgPrompt），這些工作提出把 chain-of-thought 与显式 action/工具调用、程序化 prompt、以及短/长期记忆结合起来，从而实现自动化的工具选择、执行与记忆管理；第三类则是检索增强的 KGQA 流派（RNG-KBQA/TIARA 等）和记忆增强机制（MemoryBank），它们分别暴露了检索式丢失结构信息与需要有效记忆策略的局限。将这些具体细节合并，显现出两方面的机会：一是需要一个能自主选择工具、执行 KG 操作并在多个推理步之间维护中间知识的代理框架；二是需要用可执行的程序化表示来训练较小 LLM，使其能可靠地生成可执行操作序列。KG-Agent 正是在这种背景下成为自然的下一步：它综合了代理式工具调用与记忆管理、以代码/程序化指令微调 LLM 的做法，并且针对 StructGPT 与检索式方法的局限设计了自适应的迭代决策与 KG 执行器，从而使较小模型也能高效完成复杂的 KG 推理。
arxiv:2402.11163.sci_pattern_reason: 论文把复杂KG推理拆成可互换的模块（LLM、多功能工具箱、KG执行器、知识记忆）并通过迭代机制组合它们，典型的模块化流水线思路；同时合成了代码化的指令调优数据（数据/评估工程 P05），并在推理时以工具选择/记忆更新来实时控制行为（推理时控制 P09）。

arxiv:2603.28533.title: GraphWalker: Agentic Knowledge Graph Question Answering via Synthetic Trajectory Curriculum
arxiv:2603.28533.abstract: Agentic knowledge graph question answering (KGQA) requires an agent to iteratively interact with knowledge graphs (KGs), posing challenges in both training data scarcity and reasoning generalization. Specifically, existing approaches often restrict agent exploration: prompting-based methods lack autonomous navigation training, while current training pipelines usually confine reasoning to predefined trajectories. To this end, this paper proposes GraphWalker, a novel agentic KGQA framework that addresses these challenges through Automated Trajectory Synthesis and Stage-wise Fine-tuning. GraphWalker adopts a two-stage SFT training paradigm: First, the agent is trained on structurally diverse trajectories synthesized from constrained random-walk paths, establishing a broad exploration prior over the KG; Second, the agent is further fine-tuned on a small set of expert trajectories to develop reflection and error recovery capabilities. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our stage-wise SFT paradigm unlocks a higher performance ceiling for a lightweight reinforcement learning (RL) stage, enabling GraphWalker to achieve state-of-the-art performance on CWQ and WebQSP. Additional results on GrailQA and our constructed GraphWalkerBench confirm that GraphWalker enhances generalization to out-of-distribution reasoning paths. The code is publicly available at https://github.com/XuShuwenn/GraphWalker
arxiv:2603.28533.synthesis_narrative: 近年的研究为代理化 KGQA 奠定了三类关键基础：一类是将“思考+行动”融入单步交互的 ReAct 范式，它具体说明了在生成内部推理同时调用工具以获得外部证据的可行性；另一类是若干提示式图遍历系统（如 ToG、GoG），它们展示了基于提示的迭代检索在生成性推理上的优势但也暴露出对封闭模型与固定工作流的依赖；第三类则是基于强化学习的 KGQA（如 KG‑R1）和相应的策略优化技术（如 GRPO），它们证明了策略优化能进一步提升长期决策，但在依赖预提取子图时容易陷入探索瓶颈。与此同时，CWQ 与 WebQSP 等数据集确立了复杂多跳、可执行 SPARQL 的评价范式并为构造轨迹提供了谓词与种子实体的资源。綜合这些工作，可以看出一個明显的机会：将“可训练的代理式交互范式”与“结构多样化的轨迹监督”以及“稳健的策略优化器”结合，能同时解决提示方法的不可训练性、RL 方法的探索局限与数据稀缺问题。GraphWalker 正是在此脉络下的自然延续：它借鉴 ReAct 的交互格式、以 ToG/GoG 与 KG‑R1 揭示的局限为改进目标，利用受限随机游走合成大规模结构多样轨迹作为 SFT 阶段的探索先验，并以 GRPO 为 RL 基础在两阶段 SFT 提供的先验上进一步提升性能。
arxiv:2603.28533.sci_pattern_reason: 论文从‘缺乏探索先验’这一具体缺口出发，重新表述问题并以合成轨迹与分阶段SFT作为约束和解决方案（典型的 Gap-Driven Reframing）。同时大量工程化构造了GraphSynth/GraphRoll数据集并验证其对泛化的作用，属于数据与评测工程（P05）；训练流程采用分阶段SFT→轻量RL的模块化管线设计，也体现了模块化流水线思想（P04）。

arxiv:2510.18821.title: Search Self-play: Pushing the Frontier of Agent Capability without Supervision
arxiv:2510.18821.abstract: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) has become the mainstream technique for training LLM agents. However, RLVR highly depends on well-crafted task queries and corresponding ground-truth answers to provide accurate rewards, which requires significant human effort and hinders the scaling of RL processes, especially in agentic scenarios. Although a few recent works explore task synthesis methods, the difficulty of generated agentic tasks can hardly be controlled to provide effective RL training advantages. To achieve agentic RLVR with higher scalability, we explore self-play training for deep search agents, in which the learning LLM utilizes multi-turn search engine calling and acts simultaneously as both a task proposer and a problem solver. The task proposer aims to generate deep search queries with well-defined ground-truth answers and increasing task difficulty. The problem solver tries to handle the generated search queries and output the correct answer predictions. To ensure that each generated search query has accurate ground truth, we collect all the searching results from the proposer's trajectory as external knowledge, then conduct retrieval-augmentation generation (RAG) to test whether the proposed query can be correctly answered with all necessary search documents provided. In this search self-play (SSP) game, the proposer and the solver co-evolve their agent capabilities through both competition and cooperation. With substantial experimental results, we find that SSP can significantly improve search agents' performance uniformly on various benchmarks without any supervision under both from-scratch and continuous RL training setups. The code is at https://github.com/Qwen-Applications/SSP.
arxiv:2510.18821.synthesis_narrative: 多项既有工作在技术细节上为本文奠定了直接基础：AlphaGo Zero 首次把自对弈证明为无需人工标签即可产生连续自适应训练分布的通用范式；Lewis 等人的 RAG 明确了用检索文档作为可验证证据来保证生成答案正确性的实用机制；Guo 提出的 RLVR 体系把代理训练的问题形式化为“以可核验答案为奖励”的范式，构成了本文所要改进的训练范畴；Search‑R1 则提供了与本文共享的深度搜索代理实现与评测协议，是本文主要对比与改进的基线；WebSailor 等查询合成方法揭示了离线合成在验证成本与难度控制上的局限；而 SPAG 与 R‑Zero 系列工作展示了把自对弈用于 LLM 能力提升以及同时训练 proposer/solver 的可行性但各自受限于模型内知识或缺乏工具交互。 这些前作共同暴露的机会是清晰的：需要一个既能在线自生训练题目又能保证题目答案可核验、并能随 solver 能力自适应升级的代理训练流程。Search Self‑play 正是在此基础上自然衔接：把自对弈的自适应课程思想与 RAG 的检索验证机制结合，且将 proposer 装备真实搜索工具实现外部证据挖掘，从而在 RLVR 框架下实现无监督、可验证且动态提升难度的深度搜索代理训练。
arxiv:2510.18821.sci_pattern_reason: 论文以‘标注/可验证奖励稀缺’为出发点，把问题重构为模型自我生成并验证训练任务的自博弈（proposer ↔ solver），将原先需要人工构造的监督数据转化为内部生成的可验证约束——典型的Gap‑Driven Reframing。同时方法把数据合成与筛选（RAG 验证、噪声注入、防止‘hacking’、自适应难度）作为主要杠杆，属Data‑Centric Optimization；并以 proposer 与 solver 的分工与接口实现可替换的模块化训练流水线，体现Modular Pipeline Composition。

arxiv:2602.22576.title: Search-P1: Path-Centric Reward Shaping for Stable and Efficient Agentic RAG Training
arxiv:2602.22576.abstract: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) enhances large language models (LLMs) by incorporating external knowledge, yet traditional single-round retrieval struggles with complex multi-step reasoning. Agentic RAG addresses this by enabling LLMs to dynamically decide when and what to retrieve, but current RL-based training methods suffer from sparse outcome rewards that discard intermediate signals and low sample efficiency where failed samples contribute nothing. We propose , a framework that introduces path-centric reward shaping for agentic RAG training, comprising two key components: (1) Path-Centric Reward, which evaluates the structural quality of reasoning trajectories through order-agnostic step coverage and soft scoring that extracts learning signals even from failed samples, and (2) Dual-Track Path Scoring with offline-generated reference planners that assesses paths from both self-consistency and reference-alignment perspectives. Experiments on multiple QA benchmarks demonstrate that achieves significant improvements over Search-R1 and other strong baselines, with an average accuracy gain of 7.7 points.
arxiv:2602.22576.synthesis_narrative: 上述前作从不同侧面奠定了对“可交互检索+推理”训练问题的认识：RAG（Lewis et al.）给出了用检索补强语言模型的标准任务范式和评估框架，CoT 强调将中间推理步骤显式建模，从而使以路径为单位的过程化监督成为可能；ReAct 则示范了在生成过程中交替执行“思考”与“动作（检索/外部调用）”的范式，这三者共同构成了 agentic RAG 的问题定义与流程化设计基础。围绕训练信号与优化目标，Search-R1 和 HiPRAG 提供了两条直接可比的 RL 化热身路径：前者以稀疏的结果奖励为主，暴露了样本效率低、忽略中间信号的问题；后者则尝试以过程信息提升精度，但在对失败轨迹的利用与评分一致性上仍有限。Self-Consistency 的多路径聚合思想进一步提示可以把“路径一致性”作为稠密监督信号。综合这些工作可见的机会，当前论文顺势提出以“路径中心化”的奖励重塑：把 CoT/ReAct 的路径化执行与 Self-Consistency 的多路径评价结合，针对 Search-R1 的稀疏奖励缺陷引入双轨（自洽与参考对齐）路径评分与软结果赋分，从而把失败样本转化为有用信号并显著提升训练稳定性与样本效率。
arxiv:2602.22576.sci_pattern_reason: 论文从具体缺陷（基于结果的稀疏奖励与低样本效率）出发，将问题重构为路径级奖励以解锁新的训练信号，属于以缺口驱动的重构；同时提出了新的路径评分与软结果评分作为度量/评估工具，体现了数据与评估工程化。
